summary: First iteration testing for LoadLink truck load marketplace MVP. Backend: 13/13 pytest cases passed (health, pincode validation 6-digit/5-digit/non-digit/invalid, create load, list, sort, filter by origin/destination/combined/no-match). External pincode API (api.postalpincode.in) responding correctly: 110001 -> Central Delhi/Delhi, 400001 -> Mumbai/Maharashtra. Frontend: end-to-end flow validated on mobile viewport (390x844): profile setup -> validation -> save -> main app, post load form (pincode hints, cargo multi-select chips, placement segmented control, weight/space, date), submit creates load and routes to Load Market, market shows cards with route/specs/cargo chips/poster info and 'You' tag for own loads, filter modal opens/applies/clears, tab navigation works, edit profile via avatar opens dialog.

issues: When both filter inputs are focused/filled, the Apply button can be partially outside the visible viewport on small screens (390x844). Consider wrapping modal sheet content in a ScrollView or KeyboardAvoidingView to ensure Apply/Clear remain reachable.

react_native_issues.issue: Console warning: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents'. Originates from a child component (likely react-native-web internals or DateTimePicker). Non-blocking but should be addressed by upgrading deps.

action_items: Optional: Address Expo dependency version warnings logged at startup: '@react-native-async-storage/async-storage@3.0.2 expected 2.2.0' and '@react-native-community/datetimepicker@9.1.0 expected 8.4.4'. These versions may cause subtle runtime issues on native; web works.
Optional: Make FilterModal scrollable / KeyboardAvoidingView so Apply button stays visible on small viewports.

Optional: Backend pincode endpoint depends on external api.postalpincode.in which occasionally rate-limits/closes connections (seen in logs); consider caching successful lookups in MongoDB to improve resilience and reduce latency.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses synchronous `requests.get` inside async endpoint /api/pincode/{pincode} which blocks the event loop. Recommend httpx.AsyncClient or run_in_executor. Acceptable for MVP traffic but flag for scale.
Profile is stored in plain AsyncStorage with no server-side identity; multiple users on same device share posts and 'isMine' is determined only by phone match. OK for MVP per requirements.
No backend rate limiting / input length caps on free-text fields (poster_name, poster_company); add Pydantic max_length validators.
seed_data_creation: Test pytest run created loads with poster_name prefixed 'TEST_'; UI test created 1 load as 'Test Trucker'/9876543210/TestCo (Delhi->Mumbai, Bags+Pipes, Stackable, 8.5T/300cuft).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All MVP flows pass. EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL=https://mobile-auth-verify-1.preview.emergentagent.com. To test UI, register dialog handler BEFORE clicking submit-load-btn (the success Alert has 'View Market' button which auto-navigates only after dialog is accepted). Use mobile viewport 390x844. Pincode hints take ~1.5s to load due to external API.
